docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ECOMEDES, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3275.00 (WHICH INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY 05, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT ECOMEDES, INC. MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM FOR MAY 05, 2022 HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF ELENA BONDAREVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ECOMEDES, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KATHLEEN IGAN (CEO). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,950.00 FILED BY BONDAREVA, ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT ECOMEDES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED MAR-02-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ECOMEDES, INC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
